title: Markham
overview: A cameraman is sent to a remote Yorkshire fishing village to scout a location for a proposed horror film. Instead of being a location scout, he finds himself the subject of a reality-based horror show.  The first film in the 'Sekurig trilogy'.  Based on the work of H.P. Lovecraft.
